pi_items.source: Task description and setup script explicitly mandate creating user 'ariviera'
Task description mandates creating a person named 'Alice Riviera', mapping 'Alice' to given name
Task description mandates creating a person named 'Alice Riviera', mapping 'Riviera' to family name
Task description explicitly mandates assigning the role 'Nurse'
Task description explicitly mandates setting the password to 'Nurse123!'

privileged_info_summary: The task instructs the agent to create a new, non-existent user account with synthetic details. All metadata values ('ariviera' username, 'Alice' given name, 'Riviera' family name, 'Nurse' role, and 'Nurse123!' password) are verified to exactly match the explicit instructions provided to the agent in the task description and setup script. These values represent the target creation parameters rather than pre-existing data.
